reference: THERE WERE NO SAD LEAVE TAKINGS TO MAR THEIR PLEASURE THE CHILDREN WERE IN WILD SPIRITS AND ALL SEEMED CHEERFUL AND HAPPY AS THEY SAT OR STOOD UPON THE DECK WATCHING THE RECEDING SHORE AS THE VESSEL STEAMED OUT OF THE HARBOR
text: There were no sad leave takings to mar their pleasure. The children were in wild spirits and all seemed cheerful and happy as they sat or stood upon the deck, watching the receding shore as the vessel steamed out of the harbor.
